ddls:
CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the customer who placed the order */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the product that was ordered */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product ordered */,
  "sales" REAL /* Total sales amount for the order */,
  "discount" REAL /* Discount applied to the order */,
  "cost_of_sales" REAL /* Cost of sales for the ordered product */,
  "gross_profit" REAL /* Gross profit generated from the order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date when the order was placed */,
  "shipping_status" TEXT /* Current shipping status of the order */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used for the order */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "price" REAL /* Selling price of the product */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the category of the product */,
  "stock_level" INTEGER /* Current stock level of the product */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the supplier of the product */,
  "weight_dimensions" TEXT /* Weight and dimensions of the product */,
  "sku" TEXT /* Stock Keeping Unit identifier */,
  "reorder_threshold" INTEGER /* Threshold level to trigger reorder */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the parent category (if any) */,
  "category_image_url" TEXT /* URL to the image representing the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "discounts" (
  "discount_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each discount */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the product associated with the discount */,
  "discount_percentage" REAL /* Discount percentage */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date for the discount period */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date for the discount period */,
  "discount_type" TEXT /* Type of discount (e.g., percentage, flat) */,
  "active_status" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the discount is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("discount_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_discounts_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory_audit_logs" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit log entry */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the product being audited */,
  "change_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity change (can be positive or negative) */,
  "change_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the inventory change */,
  "audit_date" TEXT /* Date of the inventory audit entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the user who made the change */,
  "previous_stock_level" INTEGER /* Stock level before the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_audit_logs_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)
